title: cacalia bainesii
intro: Cacalia bainesii, also known as the African cacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cacalia bainesii is typically made into a tea or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs for various health remedies.
